title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How has the way we consume news changed?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two news sources have had the greatest impact on how people stay informed.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how the way we consume news has changed.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two sources have had the greatest impact.
